case_title: LEMELLE, EUGENE VS OLIVER, MELVIN CHARLES

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (POS FEE $0.00 WAIVED) SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER, MELVIN CHARLES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEMELLE, EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER, MELVIN CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEMELLE, EUGENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVER, MELVIN CHARLES $1,285.71 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,285.71, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1,714.28, AND ATTRIBUTES 75% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2007 - JUDGMENT. PARTIES PRESENT IN COURT, PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE RETAINED, DEFENDANT'S RETURNED. CLERK-BETH WILBER, COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)
